title: One Hour Before the World Wakes Up
caption:
The first hour is a decision you're making whether you think about it or not.

Most men are handing it to their phone. A notification, a scroll, a text — and suddenly they're already reactive, already behind, already letting the world set the terms for the day.

The man who gives that hour to God moves different. Slower. Steadier. Not because he's more disciplined than anyone else, but because he started somewhere worth starting.

Open the Bible before you open anything else. Move your body. Name the one thing. Pray before you plan.

Four habits. One hour. Try it for a week and see what changes.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #godlymen #morningroutine #manofgod #formation #scripture
